title: amphineuron distinctum
intro: Amphineuron distinctum is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the distinct resurrection fern. This plant is known for its ability to survive in arid conditions by drying out and then reviving when exposed to water. The medicinal properties of Amphineuron distinctum include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of certain compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation, and it has been used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions to support overall well-being.
